column2: MSP / field support contracts (35 Battery sites)
1. Days = estimated labour effort from AlphaX_Project_Schedule.csv for each assigned resource group
2. Stand Alone model: no Bosch-integration phase; replaces Trinity Phase 6 (Stabilisation / Merger Zone exit)
3. No JCI / seller team costs — Bosch is the seller; Bosch IT Team rows cover all seller-side delivery tasks
4. NewCo Battery Team covers NewCo ramp-up effort only; full NewCo IT organisation costs not included until buyer confirmed
5. KPMG rate at EUR 90/hr is blended methodology and PMO support rate; excludes specialist technical advisory
6. Migration Partner (ERP/SAP) covers shell copy execution and SIT1/SIT2 support; excludes SAP licence costs
7. Regional rates: EMEA EUR 180/hr | AP EUR 99/hr | AM EUR 165/hr (consistent with Trinity benchmarks)
8. Bosch TSA residual services in Phase 5 charged as Bosch IT Ops; TSA is minimal scope versus Trinity 18-month full TSA
9. Total is ~34% lower than Trinity (EUR 4.51M) reflecting smaller scope: 35 vs 180 sites / 3K vs 8K users / 5 vs 6 phases
10. Budget baseline to be formally approved and locked at QG1 (31 Aug 2026)
